zh.lifeSummary: 當Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk於1163年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特可時，他的父親Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen24歲，母親Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen19歲。他於1194年與Hadewig van Merum在荷蘭利包格梅盧姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在荷蘭努-布拉班特可被列為heer van cuijk。他去世於1233年在荷蘭努-布拉班特阿斯特享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk于1163年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特可时，他的父亲Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen24岁，母亲Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen19岁。他于1194年与Hadewig van Merum在荷兰利包格梅盧姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在荷兰努-布拉班特可被列为heer van cuijk。他去世于1233年在荷兰努-布拉班特阿斯特享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Albert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Hendrikz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk was born in 1163, in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen, was 24 and his mother, Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, was 19. He married Hadewig van Merum in 1194, in Merum, Limburg, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as heer van cuijk in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands. He died in 1233, in Asten, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 70.

fr.Grave, Land van Cuijk, North Brabant, Ne: Grave, Land van Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk est né en 1163, à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Hadewig van Merum en 1194, à Merum, Limbourg, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est heer van cuijk à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas. Il est décédé en 1233, à Asten, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.Grave, Land van Cuijk, North Brabant, Ne: Grave, Land van Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande
de.lifeSummary: Als Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk 1163 in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen 24 und seine Mutter Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen 19. Er hat 1194 in Merum, Limburg, Niederlande Hadewig van Merum geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als heer van cuijk in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande aufgeführt. Er starb 1233 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Asten, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

Lui sposato Hadewig van Merum nel 1194, nel Merum, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come heer van cuijk nel Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi. Morì nel 1233, nel Asten, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Albert Hendrikz van Cuijkが1163年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクで生まれた時，父Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsenは24歳，母Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpenは19歳であった。1194年にオランダリンブルグメルムでHadewig van Merumと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。オランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクでの職業はheer van cuijkと記録されている。彼は1233年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントアステンで70歳で死去した。

ko.Grave, Land van Cuijk, North Brabant, Ne: 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 랜드 버 쿠이제이크 그레이브
ko.lifeSummary: Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk(이)가 1163년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 쿠이제이크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1194년 네덜란드 림버그 머에서 Hadewig van Merum(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 쿠이제이크에서 heer van cuijk이었다. 그는 1233년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 애스텐에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk nasceu em 1163, em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Hadewig van Merum em 1194, em Merum, Limburgo, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como heer van cuijk em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos. Ele faleceu em 1233, em Asten, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 70 anos.

ru.Grave, Land van Cuijk, North Brabant, Ne: грав, ланд ван куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk родился в 1163 г. в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Hadewig van Merum в 1194 г. в местности мирум, лимбург, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии heer van cuijk в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды. Он умер в 1233 г. в местности астен, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albert Hendrikz van Cuijk nació en 1163, en Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Hadewig van Merum en 1194, en Merum, Limburg, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era heer van cuijk en Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos. Murió en 1233, en Asten, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, a la edad de 70 años.
